user.title: Villa HVAC
user.description: Set up the Villa HVAC orchestration (single instance). Tunables are on the Configure screen after setup.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Villa HVAC instance is allowed.

init.title: Villa HVAC options
init.description: Tunables for the supervisor. Each feature also has its own opt-in switch (Supervisor, Duty cycle, Fan pacing, Return pre-cond); these settings only take effect once the relevant switch is on.

data.away_escalation_hours: Hours away before switching to Via
data.windows_free_cool_margin: Windows free-cool: outdoor colder than indoor by (°C)
data.shading_proportional: Proportional shading (scale depth by sun + heat)
data.duty_peak_outdoor: Duty cycle · peak outdoor temp, no rest above (°C)
data.weather_entity: Weather entity for the forecast (temperature + cloud)
data.precool_margin: Pre-cool margin vs the coming peak (°C)
data.notify_target: Notify service for the “when are you back?” ask

data_description.night_heat_threshold: Camere silenziose (#2b): in Notte a bedroom above this runs a brief low-fan burst.
data_description.rack_temp_threshold: Above this temperature for 3 minutes, the rack guard forces shared P1 cooling.
data_description.p1_guard_threshold: Above this for 3 minutes, the P1 landing runs BOTH the rack and office fans (secondary trigger).
data_description.auto_wake_time: Time the bedrooms leave the silent-night state (HH:MM:SS).
data_description.away_escalation_hours: #2c: after the adults are away this long, drop the house to Via.
data_description.season: auto = detect from the reference thermostat; or force summer / winter.
data_description.summer_via_offset: Cooling setback is WARMER, so this is positive (e.g. +5).
data_description.winter_via_offset: Heating setback is COOLER, so this is negative (e.g. -2).
data_description.free_cool_outdoor: Outdoor below this → suppress active cooling.
data_description.windows_free_cool_count: With the Windows free cooling switch on: at least this many window contacts open → coast on the outside air.
data_description.windows_free_cool_margin: …and the outdoor air at least this much cooler than the house indoor mean.
data_description.window_alert_minutes: A window contact open this long pages Mattia + Ehi (once per opening; 0 disables; suppressed while the house is deliberately airing).
data_description.shading_enabled: #6: close sun-facing blinds to cut solar gain on cooled rooms.
data_description.shading_solar_threshold: Close a sun-facing cover above this irradiance.
data_description.shading_default_position: Fallback position for rooms without a per-room shade number.
data_description.shading_proportional: Scale each blind's depth with irradiance (+ a hot-outdoor boost): gentle at the threshold, deepest (the default position) at full sun. A per-room number still overrides.
data_description.duty_max_stint_min: #9: cap the villa's continuous cooling stint before a forced rest.
data_description.duty_cooloff_min: Length of the forced rest (BLOCCO) after the stint.
data_description.duty_comfort_max: A room above this aborts the rest — comfort always wins.
data_description.duty_peak_outdoor: At/above this outdoor temp, don't rest (let the heat pump run).
data_description.comfort_floor: Lower bound on the band center — #9 pre-cool / PV bank never bank below this. Default = house setpoint − 2 until pinned here.
data_description.weather_entity: Point this at weather.openweathermap for a better cloud/temperature forecast than Met.no. Feeds the pre-cool planner (temperature) and the solar-forecast cloud shape.
data_description.precool_lookahead_hours: How far ahead to look for a hot peak (thermal mass needs a long window).
data_description.precool_margin: Only pre-cool while now is at least this much cooler than the peak.
data_description.precool_offset: How far below the normal target to push setpoints while pre-cooling.
data_description.band_width: #3 v2: total comfort band the room swings in (wider = fewer, longer cycles).
data_description.band_slam: How far the setpoint is slammed past centre to force the valve open/closed.
data_description.fan_min: Global rest/min-circulation fan; 0 = fan off during REST. Per-zone overrides exist.
data_description.model_learning_enabled: F2 observer: learn each room's thermal model online (read-only; safe on).
data_description.precool_max_depth: Deepest pre-cool the 12h planner will schedule.
data_description.solar_forecast_enabled: Use a nowcast-anchored solar curve (astral × forecast cloud, pinned to the live gw3000a pyranometer) for the 12h plan. Plan-only — the live band always uses the real gw3000a reading.
data_description.seff_enabled: Feed the thermal model a per-room effective irradiance computed from sun geometry, the verified facade normals, and live cover positions instead of the house pyranometer value. Flipping this rebases each affected room's learned solar coefficient to the prior (it re-learns in the new units).
data_description.return_max_lead_hours: #8: cap how early pre-conditioning starts before your return ETA.
data_description.return_margin_min: Safety margin added to the computed pre-cond lead time.
data_description.notify_target: e.g. mobile_app_iphone (without the notify. prefix). Blank = auto-detect a mobile_app target.
data_description.pv_floor_rich: How cold to bank the rooms during the free-solar efficient hours (deeper). Summer value — revise for the heating season.
data_description.pv_floor_poor: Gentler bank floor on solar-poor days, to limit grid draw. Summer value.
data_description.pv_coast_relax: How much to raise the band centre to DEFER cooling in the hot, inefficient evening (capped at the duty comfort-max).
data_description.pv_eff_fraction: Bank now when this hour's cooling effectiveness is at least this fraction of the best upcoming hour.
data_description.pv_eff_min: Net cooling rate (°C/h) below which an hour is 'ineffective' — defer/hold instead of banking.
data_description.pv_daily_need_kwh: Rough estimate of the Condominio's daily electricity use, to judge whether forecast solar covers the day (solar-rich vs solar-poor). Tunable.
